sections.title: Purpose
sections.summary: Review game-data and tuning changes through simulation, design doctrine, and player-risk framing.

sections.title: Responsibilities
sections.summary: - diff balance-relevant data - route the right hats - run simulation where available - surface likely player-facing outcomes - recommend what must be tested before shipping

sections.title: Key Question
sections.summary: What player behavior or trust curve changes if this number ships?
